summary: Completed testing of ETI Educom admin panel enhancements: Referral Management and MSG91 WhatsApp Settings. All backend APIs passed (12/12 tests). Frontend UI fully functional with all elements working correctly - stats display, search, filter, status update, delete, enable/disable toggle, and settings save.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/referrals returns 200 with list of referrals
Backend: POST /api/referrals creates new referral
Backend: PUT /api/referrals/{id} updates status and reward amount
Backend: PUT /api/referrals/{id} supports all statuses (pending, contacted, enrolled, rewarded, rejected)
Backend: DELETE /api/referrals/{id} deletes referral
Backend: DELETE /api/referrals/{nonexistent} returns 404
Backend: GET /api/msg91-settings returns 200 with settings
Backend: POST /api/msg91-settings saves settings
Backend: POST /api/msg91-settings toggles is_enabled correctly
Backend: POST /api/msg91-settings/test works (returns success/failure based on settings)
Backend: GET /api/health returns healthy status
Backend: GET /api/ returns API info
Frontend: Admin login works with correct password
Frontend: Referrals tab displays with correct tab label and count
Frontend: Referral stats cards display (Total, Pending, Contacted, Enrolled, Rewarded)
Frontend: Search input present and functional
Frontend: Status filter dropdown present and functional
Frontend: Refresh button present and functional
Frontend: Referral list displays with referrer/friend info
Frontend: Update button opens dialog modal
Frontend: Update dialog has status dropdown and reward amount input
Frontend: Save Changes button updates referral successfully
Frontend: Success toast appears after update
Frontend: Delete button (trash icon) visible for each referral
Frontend: WhatsApp tab displays with correct label
Frontend: WhatsApp Settings Manager loads correctly
Frontend: Enable/Disable toggle present and functional
Frontend: Auth Key input present
Frontend: Integrated Number input present with default value
Frontend: Template Name input present
Frontend: Template Namespace input present
Frontend: Thank You Message textarea present
Frontend: Save Settings button works - shows success toast
Frontend: Test Phone Number input present
Frontend: Test Name input present
Frontend: Send Test Message button present
Frontend: Template Variables info section displays correctly
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for UI testing
Backend API follows RESTful conventions with proper status codes
MSG91 WhatsApp integration includes proper auth key masking for security
Referral status transitions are all supported (pending, contacted, enrolled, rewarded, rejected)
WhatsApp thank you messages integrated with form submissions (referrals, enquiries, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Created test referrals via API for testing update and delete functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel Referral Management and MSG91 WhatsApp Settings fully tested. Referrals tab shows stats (total/pending/contacted/enrolled/rewarded), supports search by name/phone, filter by status, update status/reward, and delete. WhatsApp tab allows enabling/disabling notifications, configuring MSG91 API settings (auth key, integrated number, template name, namespace, thank you message), and testing with a phone number. WhatsApp messages are sent automatically on form submissions when enabled.

search_filter: Filter by status (All, Pending, Contacted, Enrolled, Rewarded, Rejected)
crud_operations: View referral list with referrer/friend details
ui_elements: Update modal with status dropdown and reward input

info_section: Template Variables explanation (body_1: name, body_2: form type, body_3: thank you message)
